additionalInfo.description: System that checks the evolution of a beehive. When the weight is stable it means it's time to get the honey.
function to get timeseries of the weight on a specific device
alarm informing that the weight of the beehive is stable and it's suggested to gather some honey
node to clear the previous alarm of the honey ready

configuration.alarmDetailsBuildJs: return "Error in getting weight timeseries from device "+metadata.deviceName;

configuration.tbelScript: return {msg: msg, metadata: metadata, msgType: msgType};

additionalInfo.description: node that calculates how the slop can change and adds a new data to the message
switch that checks if honey is ready
